title: BUG #17549: wrong index scan plan with RLS
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE def (x integer, y text, z boolean DEFAULT true);
INSERT INTO def SELECT CAST(FLOOR(RAND() * 10000) AS INTEGER), CAST(FLOOR(RAND() * 10000) AS VARCHAR), (RAND() > 0.5);
CREATE POLICY def_rls_policy ON def USING (x = CAST(STR_TO_INT(app.x) AS INTEGER));
SELECT * FROM def WHERE x = 1 AND LOWER(y) = 'some_value';
key_bug_features: RLS restricts index usage with non-leak-proof functional index
